summary: Canadian AI policy, sovereign compute, talent retention, IP and data residency, alignment posture, Bill C-27 / AIDA, federal AI strategy.

frame_manifest.frame_name: AI talent retention vs US/UK brain drain
Data residency + cross-border AI training data

sample_questions: What sovereign compute capacity does Canada have for training frontier models as of 2025?
How does Bill C-27 AIDA compare to the EU AI Act on prohibited-practices scope?
What does the 2024 Canadian Sovereign AI Compute Strategy commit on dollars and capacity?
How has Canadian AI researcher retention tracked vs US and UK from 2018 to 2024?
out_of_scope_examples: Should I take a job at a Canadian AI startup or move to San Francisco?
Is OpenAI or Anthropic a better partner for the Canadian government?
